title: Genome Engine — Data Model (8–12-dim preference vector, encrypted CRUD)
description: Define the Personal Fit Genome data model in lib/genome/. Preference vector: 8–12 dimensions (e.g. price-sensitivity, eco-preference, brand-trust, quality-weight, novelty, review-skepticism, speed, bundle-affinity). CRUD operations backed by the Storage layer (P1.2): loadGenome(), saveGenome(), resetGenome(). All data encrypted at rest. TypeScript types exported for downstream consumers (P1.7, P1.8). Coverage floor rises to 50% in this PR. TDD required.
